backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the ICP backend that includes blob storage mixin and implements user profile management, page content, pricing entries, and CSR info endpoints with role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the implementation of Google Tag (gtag.js) injection with ID G-NQHZEVRPBL into the Zürich couples landing page, following the Basel page pattern.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key features of each component, page, hook, and configuration file.
frontend/ic-assets.json: ICP asset configuration that enables serving the .well-known directory (used for domain verification).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with German locale, SEO meta tags for PaarWeg coaching site, and Plausible Analytics tracking script for www.paarweg.com.
frontend/public/.well-known/ic-domains: ICP domain verification file listing paarweg.com and www.paarweg.com as the canonical domains for the canister.
frontend/public/sitemap.xml: XML sitemap listing all public URLs for paarweg.com including homepage, location-specific landing pages, service pages, and legal page with priorities and change frequencies.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that sets up TanStack Router with all page routes (including Zürich, Basel, and Swiss online landing pages), wrapped in ThemeProvider and QueryClientProvider.
frontend/src/components/admin/ThemeHexCo: Admin UI card component that displays runtime-computed HEX values for the page background and primary button colors, with copy-to-clipboard functionality for each.
frontend/src/components/CalendlyInlineWi: Empty file placeholder for a Calendly inline widget component.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Site-wide layout component providing sticky header with desktop and mobile navigation, scroll-to-top on route change, and a footer with Basel headquarters info and attribution.
frontend/src/components/MobileReadMore.t: Mobile-only collapsible content component that truncates long text behind a 'Mehr anzeigen' toggle button with a gradient fade, controlled by a feature flag.
frontend/src/config/featureFlags.ts: Centralized feature flag configuration; currently defines a single flag to enable or disable mobile 'Read more / Show less' content compacting behavior.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useComputedThemeHexCo: React hook that reads runtime computed CSS styles via temporary DOM probe elements to derive HEX color values for the background and primary button, re-computing on dark mode class changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flows, identity persistence, and delegation validity checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching hardcoded CSR metadata and generating a PKCS#10 CSR client-side using the Web Crypto API with RSA-2048 signing.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining light and dark mode CSS custom properties for a warm sand/terracotta theme, plus base body and mobile typography styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: About page for Roland Soder on the PaarWeg site, displaying his bio, credentials, and coaching philosophy with SEO meta tags, Open Graph tags, and a hero section with photo.
frontend/src/pages/BaselCouplesLandingPa: Landing page targeting couples in Basel for online couples counseling, featuring a video hero, Google Ads tag injection scoped to this page, and relevant SEO/OG meta tags.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact and appointment booking page for PaarWeg, showing direct contact info (email, phone), a Calendly booking link, and an FAQ accordion, with SEO and Open Graph meta tags.
frontend/src/pages/CouplesPage.tsx: Service page describing couples coaching offerings for pairs in any relationship phase, with a hero section, feature cards, a collapsible mobile read-more component, and SEO/OG meta tags.
frontend/src/pages/CSRGeneratorPage.tsx: Admin/utility page that auto-generates an SSL Certificate Signing Request (CSR) on load using a backend mutation, then displays the CSR and public key with copy and download options.
frontend/src/pages/DomainVerificationPag: Fetches and displays the status of the `/.well-known/ic-domains` file, showing success, error, or checking state to verify Internet Computer domain configuration for www.paarweg.com.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main landing page for PaarWeg that sets SEO metadata (title, Open Graph, Twitter Card, JSON-LD structured data) and renders the site's hero and feature sections.
frontend/src/pages/LegalPage.tsx: Displays the Impressum (legal notice) and Datenschutz (privacy policy) information for Roland Soder Coaching, including contact details, liability disclaimers, and copyright notice.
frontend/src/pages/MenPage.tsx: Coaching page targeting men in relationships, setting relevant SEO/OG metadata and rendering a hero section with descriptive copy and a call-to-action button.
frontend/src/pages/PricingPage.tsx: Pricing page listing coaching session costs (60 CHF intro, 190 CHF full session) with SEO metadata, Open Graph/Twitter tags, and an FAQ accordion component.
frontend/src/pages/SitemapPage.tsx: Renders a human-readable XML sitemap listing all public PaarWeg URLs with priorities and change frequencies, intended for submission to search engines.
frontend/src/pages/SwissOnlineCouplesLan: Landing page for Swiss online couples counseling (PaarWeg) with SEO meta tags, Open Graph tags, JSON-LD structured data, and a hero video section with play/mute controls.
frontend/src/pages/TechnicalStatusPage.t: Admin/diagnostic page that runs and displays status checks for DNS, SSL, WWW CNAME, 301 redirects, Plausible analytics, and domain resolution, along with a theme hex codes section.
frontend/src/pages/WomenPage.tsx: Landing page targeting women seeking relationship coaching, with SEO/OG meta setup, a hero section describing the service, and a collapsible mobile read-more component.
frontend/src/pages/ZurichCouplesLandingP: Zürich-specific couples counseling landing page that dynamically injects Google Analytics (gtag) scoped to this page only, sets SEO/OG meta tags, and includes a hero video with play/mute controls.
frontend/src/types/calendly.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file, likely intended for Calendly type definitions.
frontend/src/utils/color.ts: Utility module providing functions to convert CSS color strings (rgb, rgba, oklch) to HEX format, including OKLCH-to-RGB conversion via OKLab intermediate space.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routing, persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based colors, border radii, accordion animations, and enabling the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the PaarWeg web project, recording existing features (Google Tag on Basel page) and a pending task to integrate Google Tag G-NQHZEVRPBL on the Zürich couples landing page.
